hero.headline: *Rapid* response when the power's out
hero.subheadline: Licensed Columbus electricians who show up, work clean, and get it right the first time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From quick fixes to complete rewires, we handle electrical work that keeps Columbus homes running safe.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Dead outlets, tripped breakers, flickering lights. We diagnose fast and fix it right.

services.title: New Installations
services.description: Light fixtures, ceiling fans, outlets, and switches installed to code every time.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old electrical panels upgraded to handle modern power demands safely.

services.title: Outdoor Wiring
services.description: Hot tubs, landscape lighting, and exterior outlets wired weatherproof and code-compliant.

about.heading: Columbus electrical team that works clean
about.body: We're Columbus electricians who answer the phone and show up when scheduled. Real people, real trucks, real solutions.

reviews.name: Karen J.
reviews.text: Great job installing new lights throughout our house. The electrician was knowledgeable, worked quickly, and everything functions perfectly.

reviews.name: Shawn J.
reviews.text: Punctual team that worked neatly installing new light fittings. They gave excellent advice about energy-saving options. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Jennifer S.
reviews.text: Needed proper outdoor wiring for hot tub installation. Everything was run safely, weatherproofed correctly, and met code. Very professional and communicative.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast electrical service throughout central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Licensed Columbus electricians ready to handle your project. Free estimates, upfront pricing, work that lasts.
